events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a splice outside a box in a residential electrical setting, in-service. NEC 110.14 requires electrical connections to be made in approved enclosures. Splices outside a box are non-compliant and a fire/shock hazard. Decision: fail. Risk: high. Component conditions: non-compliant, possibly degraded/failed depending on exposure. Since in-service and splice outside box, it's non-compliant and likely degraded/failed due to exposure.

  "rationale": "NEC 110.14 requires terminations and splices to be made in approved enclosures with proper insulation and mechanical protection. A splice outside a box is non-compliant and, while in service, is exposed to damage and thermal stress, making it a high-risk fire/shock hazard.",
